title: chrysanthemum mucronatum
intro: Chrysanthemum mucronatum, also known as Korean chrysanthemum or han-byeok, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Chrysanthemum mucronatum lie in its anti-inflammatory and antiviral compounds, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu, as well as its potential to prevent the development of certain types of cancer. Chrysanthemum mucronatum is often prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of creams or ointments to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
